def negative_redis_commands_issued_individually_in_loop_without_pipeline():
    rule_id = "redis_commands_issued_individually_in_loop_without_pipeline"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Redis SETEX/HSET/GET commands issued one per loop iteration without using a pipeline."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
